Fields.Name: Aggression Group
Fields.Description: Used to group entities together so they become aggressive at the same trigger and sometimes used with aggro boundaries.

Fields.Name: Appearance Event ID
Fields.Description: Used in ESD. 1 through to 7 are used to determine NG+ appearance.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [1]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [2]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [3]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [4]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [5]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Map Object Bonfire ID
Fields.Description: The ID of the bonfire this entity is linked to. Used with ascetics, effigies, and multi-player.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [6]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [7]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: AI Think ID
Fields.Description: The AI for this entity. A boss AI will need to be damaged, changed, or ESD wizardry if you move it elsewhere.

Fields.Name: Hostile Event ID [1]
Fields.Description: Flag to be set when the entity becomes hostile towards the player character.

Fields.Name: Hostile Event ID [2]
Fields.Description: Flag to be set when the entity becomes hostile towards the player character.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [8]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Location Event ID [9]
Fields.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Fields.Name: Model Mask
Fields.Description: Determines which model masks to use. Also decides which model mask set to use in color params.

Fields.Name: Itemlot ID
Fields.Description: Typically the itemlot entry that acts as a drop table for this entity.

Fields.Name: Grave Event ID
Fields.Description: Flag to be set when the entity is dead and requires a gravestone for the player character to interact with.
